meta.title: Blog Card Lab Paper
meta.subtitle: Single-image visual references for a restrained card-based Chinese personal tech blog.
meta.brief: 个人技术/生活博客，中文个人站点。将 blog 一级页面改为更卡片化的视觉系统，但保持长文阅读效率与低噪音。

signals.label: Audience
signals.value: 工作间隙阅读长文的读者，需要低噪音、快速进入正文、长时间可读。

signals.label: Visual Route
signals.value: 实验纸面：研究笔记、工程日志、细线卡片、克制科技感。

signals.label: Card Rule
signals.value: 卡片用于信息分组，不逐段包裹正文。

items.title: Home Signal Paper
items.caption: Homepage reference: a calm paper-like blog surface with recent article cards and signal-log hierarchy.
items.motif: paper surface, corner marks, article cards, asymmetric heading
items.prompt: Single visual reference image of a restrained personal tech blog homepage on a softly tinted paper surface, recent article cards arranged with generous but compact spacing, thin one-pixel borders, tiny corner registration marks, asymmetrical signal-log heading, muted warm accent used sparingly, readable long-form editorial feeling, no readable text, no logos, no real brand names, no collage, no grid of separate concepts, no screenshot chrome, no neon glow, no SaaS dashboard styling. Single coherent frame, one composed scene or object detail, not a collage, not a grid, not a contact sheet, not a scrapbook, not a mood board layout.
